# `liber:base@1`

Generated reference for the `liber:base` package (`base.lsidl`). See [the LSIDL language](../../../LSIDL.md).

LiberSystem base package - common error enum shared across all services.

## Types

### type `koid`

A kernel object identifier. Since package version 1.

Wire-transparent alias of `u64`.

### type `ticks`

Monotonic scheduler ticks. Since package version 1.

Wire-transparent alias of `u64`.

### type `name`

A semantic name carried as UTF-8 text. Since package version 1.

Wire-transparent alias of `string`.

### enum `error`

A common error enum rendered identically in binary, JSON, and CLI. Each case names a kernel ERR_* condition; the wire value is the enum's own 0-based ordinal, not the negative ERR_* number.

| case | ordinal | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `denied` | 0 | Access denied (~ ERR_ACCESS_DENIED). |
| `not-found` | 1 | No such object exists. |
| `invalid` | 2 | Invalid argument or state (~ ERR_INVALID). |
| `again` | 3 | Would block, try again later (~ ERR_WOULD_BLOCK). |
| `closed` | 4 | Peer closed connection (~ ERR_PEER_CLOSED). |
